playbook.intent: Routine PR review → paired senior+junior session where AI handles the mechanical floor and human time goes to design + judgment.
playbook.scope: Senior + junior pair on a single PR review. AI bot pre-runs lint / security / test-coverage on the diff so the human time is freed for design, naming, boundaries, and judgment. Senior narrates *why* on each comment. Junior leaves with a written next-PR checklist captured from the session. Mistakes go to mistake-memory; patterns to pattern-memory.

success-criteria.criterion: PR reviewed end-to-end with senior narrating reasoning
Junior next-PR checklist written down (≥5 concrete items)
Mistake-memory updated where junior's first instincts were wrong

stage.name: Pre-review — AI floor
stage.intent: AI clears the mechanical noise; humans review what's left.

outputs.output: Cleaned diff with auto-fixed items resolved

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after pre-commit + CodeQL autofix have run. Senior should not be reading whitespace.

stage.name: Paired review session
stage.intent: Senior narrates; junior asks; reviewer-graph-vs-diff perspective applied.

tasks.task: Walk the diff vs graph-context (callers/callees) together
Senior narrates the why behind each comment
Junior states their first instinct out loud, then re-evaluates
Pair on at least one concrete refactor live

stage.decision-gate: Advance once junior can summarise the senior's reasoning back unaided. If not, slow down — the session failed its primary goal.

stage.name: Capture + close
stage.intent: Convert the session into durable assets: junior's checklist + team memory.

tasks.task: Update mistake-memory where junior's first instincts were wrong
Reflexion-learning entry for senior on their own mentoring

stage.decision-gate: Required output: written checklist. Verbal mentoring without artefact = lesson lost by next PR.

extra.value: [Speeding up reviews — this is intentionally slower than a normal review, Hiring screen reviews — see hiring-screen-take-home-review, Architectural review — see weekly-architectural-review]
[Junior has read the team's code-review-basics methodology, AI bot pre-runs lint + security + coverage on PRs, Pre-commit + autofix wired so trivial issues never reach review]

['Senior overrides without explanation — junior learns compliance, not judgment', AI noise not pre-cleared — human time burned on whitespace, No artefact at the end — junior's next PR repeats the same misses, Treating the session as a normal-speed review — defeats the mentoring goal]
['Can the junior write down what the senior taught them?', 'Did at least one comment include ''because X, not Y'' reasoning?', 'Did anything from the session end up in pattern-memory?']

{human: faion get-content pr-review-with-junior-mentoring --format md, agent: faion get-content pr-review-with-junior-mentoring --format context, json: faion get-content pr-review-with-junior-mentoring --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P6 product-dev team persona}]
